name: Roasted Sweet Onions with Balsamic Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 4 Medium Sweet Onions (peeled and halved horizontally)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 Degrees F (175 Degrees C).
2. Rub each onion half with olive oil.
3. Sprinkle both sides of the onion halves with salt and white pepper.
4. Place the onions, cut side down, in a large skillet that fits in the oven.
5. Bake the onions until they are soft, approximately one hour.
6. Using a spatula, transfer the onions to a serving dish, keeping the cut side up.
7. In the same skillet used for roasting the onions, add water, balsamic vinegar, brown sugar, and butter.
8. Scrape the skillet to incorporate any brown, baked-on juices from the onions.
9. Heat until boiling, then boil for one minute to reduce the mixture.
10. Spoon the sauce over each onion.
11. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
12. Serve hot.
